claims.statement: The mechanism of action of risperidone in schizophrenia is unclear.
The label proposes dopamine Type 2 and serotonin Type 2 receptor antagonism as a possible mediator of therapeutic activity in schizophrenia.
The clinical effect described in the label involves risperidone and its major metabolite, 9-hydroxyrisperidone.

unresolved.reason: A11 scope only supports risperidone label-derived mechanism statements.
